description: Spring REST controller directly calling Log4j logger.info() with user-supplied query parameter, triggering CVE-2021-44228 Log4Shell JNDI injection.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: App.java directly calls logger.info() with user-controlled query parameter from @RequestParam

findings.human_justification: logger.info() is called directly in the /search GET endpoint with user-controlled query parameter, making the Log4Shell JNDI injection vulnerability exploitable.
